Class TenantRecurringJobManager

Schedules Hangfire recurring jobs for every active tenant automatically. Use this instead of Hangfire.RecurringJob directly to ensure jobs run once per tenant with a properly populated ITenantContext.

object

RemoveForAllAsync(string, CancellationToken)

Removes all recurring job entries for the given job ID across all tenants.

Declaration
public Task RemoveForAllAsync(string jobId, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string jobId
CancellationToken cancellationToken
Returns
Type Description
Task
| Edit this page View Source

ScheduleForAllAsync<TJob>(string, string, Expression<Func<TJob, Task>>, CancellationToken)

Schedules TJob as a recurring Hangfire job for every active tenant. Each tenant gets its own job entry: {jobId}-{tenantId}.

Declaration
public Task ScheduleForAllAsync<TJob>(string jobId, string cron, Expression<Func<TJob, Task>> methodSelector, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string jobId

Base job identifier (e.g., "daily-report").
string cron

Cron expression (e.g., Hangfire.Cron.Daily()).
Expression<Func<TJob, Task>> methodSelector

Expression pointing to the job method. Example: job => job.ExecuteAsync()
CancellationToken cancellationToken

Cancellation token.
Returns
Type Description
Task
Type Parameters
Name Description
TJob

The Hangfire job type. Must have an Execute() or ExecuteAsync() method.
